metadata.note: Browser automation blocked by Incapsula. Using shareable list workaround.

html.description: Interactive HTML list with clickable HEB links
html.useCase: Open in browser to shop online or print for store

markdown.description: Markdown format for email or documentation
markdown.useCase: Include in emails or Discord messages

json.useCase: Feed into other tools or scripts

onlineShopping: Open the HTML shopping list in your browser
Click "View on HEB" for each item to search on HEB.com
Add items to your cart as you go
Use the checkboxes to track what's been added
Proceed to checkout on HEB.com when done
inStoreShopping: Print the HTML list or open on your phone
Items are organized by store section (category)
Check off items as you add them to your cart
Estimated prices help you stay on budget
tips: HEB sometimes has substitutes - the search links will show all options
Prices are estimates based on typical HEB pricing
Same-day delivery available in most areas
